description: From the manufacturer Ansell AlphaTec provides a complete portfolio of multi-hazard protection products taking you beyond just chemical protection Ansell AlphaTec products provide wearers with the most suitable protection, comfort and confidence to continue working in a multitude of risks Whether you need maximum or minimum resistance to chemical and oils, we have the overalls that will deliver the right level of protection, without compromising comfort or dexterity. Our quality standards and controls ensure the performance, reliability, and consistency of our products. Millions of people around the world depend on ANSELL in their professional and personal lives. With Ansell, they always know they are safer or can perform better.
